name: Meat Sauce Mix
recipeIngredient: 5 pounds lean ground beef or turkey
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt shortening in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add onions, garlic, celery, and carrots (if using). Cook until onions are golden.
3. Add ground beef to the skillet. Stir and cook until meat is browned.
4. Stir in salt, pepper, Worcestershire sauce, ketchup, and hot ketchup.
5. Cover and simmer for 20 minutes.
6. Drain excess fat from the mixture.
7. Cool completely before transferring into five 1-pint freezer containers, leaving 1/2-inch space at the top.
8. Freeze and use within three months.
